name: Customer Review Feature
prompt_template: Write a social media post featuring a customer review. Customer name: {customer_name}. Dish they reviewed: {dish_reviewed}. Their testimonial quote: "{testimonial_quote}". Visit context: {visit_context}. Restaurant name: {restaurant_name}. Use an authentic, warm tone; include the quoted testimonial; invite others to visit; use community-building language; and add appreciation emojis (e.g. ❤️, ⭐, 🙏).

variables.name: dish_reviewed
variables.description: Dish or item the customer reviewed

variables.name: visit_context
variables.description: Context of the visit (e.g. date night, brunch)
